caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.context: Regional enterprise operating 24/7 with 500+ production databases and 3 PB of critical data. Infrastructure instability exposed revenue and regulatory risk.

challenge.title: Challenge
items: Estimated exposure: $250K per hour of outage
challenge.summary: Operational volatility impacting revenue protection and SLA confidence

results.title: Measurable Impact
results.conclusion: Operational stability transformed from technical function into a controlled financial risk model

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.context: National enterprise with fragmented data landscape: 12+ data sources. Separate BI, DWH and analytics environments; on-prem + cloud infrastructure.

challenge.title: Challenge
items: 3–6 months to launch new analytics use cases
challenge.summary: AI initiatives failing to move beyond pilot stage

intervention.title: Our Intervention
items: Governance and lineage embedded by design
Scalable environment for analytics & machine learning

results.title: Measurable Impact
items: AI use cases moved from pilot to production in 3 months
results.conclusion: Data platform transformed from fragmented infrastructure into a scalable AI foundation aligned with business growth

dataEngineering.title: Automated Data Engineering & Governance
dataEngineering.tagline: Trusted data is the foundation of every reliable decision.

deliver.title: What We Deliver
items: Structured and versioned ETL / ELT architecture

whyMatters.title: Why It Matters
items: Improves trust in BI and AI outputs

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.context: National enterprise with fragmented data landscape: 12+ data sources. Separate BI, DWH and analytics environments; on-prem + cloud infrastructure.

challenge.title: Challenge
items: 40% of analytics time spent on data reconciliation
Regulatory exposure due to weak data lineage
challenge.summary: Data environment lacked structure, control, and governance

intervention.title: Our Intervention
items: Structured & versioned ETL / ELT architecture (dbt-based transformations)

results.title: Measurable Impact
items: Audit traceability improved to 100% lineage coverage
results.conclusion: Data transformed from a fragmented operational burden into a controlled, trusted enterprise asset.

modernization.title: Cost-Efficient Modernization
modernization.tagline: Modern infrastructure reduces cost, risk, and vendor dependency.

deliver.title: What We Deliver
items: Migration to open-source and cost-efficient data platforms

whyMatters.title: Why It Matters
items: Enables scalable growth without exponential cost increase
Aligns IT strategy with financial planning

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.context: A large enterprise operating on legacy proprietary database platforms faced rising licensing costs, infrastructure inefficiencies, and growing vendor dependency.

challenge.title: Challenge
items: Annual licensing and support costs exceeding $1.2M
challenge.summary: Technology spend lacked predictability and strategic alignment.

intervention.title: Our Intervention
items: Migration to open and cost-efficient data platforms

results.title: Measurable Impact
results.conclusion: IT infrastructure transformed from a cost center into a predictable, scalable financial asset

comparison.title: Why Not Internal IT or Generic Integrators?

rows.internalDesc: Handle multiple IT domains — databases are not the core discipline.
rows.dataLeadDesc: Mission-critical data infrastructure is our core expertise.

rows.internalDesc: Incident response often starts after disruption impacts the business.
rows.dataLeadDesc: Failure prevention and rapid containment built into operations.

rows.internalDesc: Architecture choices influenced by existing contracts or tool familiarity.
rows.dataLeadDesc: Solutions selected for business fit — not product preference.
Thousands of incidents managed across large, regulated environments.

rows.internalDesc: Compliance and reporting layered on top — not embedded by design.
rows.dataLeadDesc: Compliance, visibility, and control integrated into daily operations.
